excerpt: There are manifestations of the universe in the human world. First of all, it is in the form of a soul which is in accordance with the form of the soul. Then there is the form of a joke which is manifested in the physical world in the form of the soul and is in accordance with the soul of the spiritual world.
source_location_hint: doctrine of cosmic correspondence and the microcosm

excerpt: Man is a rational book in terms of his partial soul and abstract intellect, which is called um al-Kitab, and the book is preserved as the heart, which is the Book of Mubeen
source_location_hint: on the human as microcosm and mirror of revelation

excerpt: It is no wonder that the whole world is hidden in the creation of man. It is a component but in reality a comprehensiveness of tomorrow. Rather, the strange thing is that yesterday was created because of Him, and tomorrow is His servant and He is His servant.
source_location_hint: on the significance of human creation and cosmic order

excerpt: The Prophet (s) got both nazar adin (lower discernment) and nazar ashraf (higher discernment). He studied with five people and learned from them the outward and inward aspects of the Shariah.
source_location_hint: on prophetic knowledge and the synthesis of sharīʿah

excerpt: Paradise is indeed the intellect and its gates are in the Messengers in their own time, and their successors after them are in that position in their own time. The key to the gate of heaven is the Word.
source_location_hint: early sections on metaphysics of intellect

excerpt: Therefore, the Messenger of Allah was nearest of all creatures to the Intellect, and therefore the Gate of Paradise.
source_location_hint: discussion of prophetic station and access to divine knowledge

excerpt: The interpreters of these allusions have always been the Prophets and their Inheritors. When they explain the reality of these gestures through interpretation, the gate opens and the person finds peace. In every age, the gates of paradise will be opened for all believers through the Imam of the Age.
source_location_hint: section on esoteric exegesis and Imamate

excerpt: The Divine Names manifest the First and the Last, the Manifest and the Hidden, and eternities both future and past refer to these twin points. Both prophethood and the Guardianship of Succession pertain exclusively to Muhammad and ʿAlī.
source_location_hint: metaphysics of divine names and twin stations
